create-hierarchical-bookmarks.title: Create Hierarchical Bookmarks in PDF
create-hierarchical-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to PdfBookmarkEditor and adding a parent bookmark with child chapter bookmarks.

import-bookmarks-merge.title: Import Bookmarks from One PDF into Another Preserving Order
import-bookmarks-merge.description: Demonstrates how to export bookmarks from a source PDF to XML and import them into a target PDF, preserving the original bookmark order.

extract-pdf-bookmarks-csv.title: Extract PDF Bookmarks to CSV
extract-pdf-bookmarks-csv.description: Reads all bookmarks from a PDF, captures their title, destination (page or explicit destination), and hierarchical level, and writes the data to a CSV file.

update-bookmark-destination.title: Update Bookmark Destination to Page Ten
update-bookmark-destination.description: Demonstrates how to change the destination of a specific bookmark to page 10 using PdfBookmarkEditor.

delete-all-bookmarks.title: Delete All Bookmarks from PDF
delete-all-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to remove all bookmarks from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and save the modified document.

delete-bookmark-verify.title: Delete a Specific Bookmark and Verify Removal
delete-bookmark-verify.description: Demonstrates how to delete a bookmark by title using PdfBookmarkEditor and verify its removal by extracting bookmarks before and after the operation.

add-top-level-bookmark.title: Add Top-Level Bookmark to PDF
add-top-level-bookmark.description: Creates a new top‑level bookmark that points to the first page of a PDF and sets its title color to blue.

add-child-bookmarks.title: Add Child Bookmarks Under a Parent Bookmark
add-child-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to add sub‑bookmarks under an existing parent bookmark in a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

extract-pdf-bookmarks-json.title: Extract PDF Bookmarks to Nested JSON
extract-pdf-bookmarks-json.description: Extracts all bookmarks from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and builds a nested JSON structure that reflects their hierarchical levels.

export-pdf-bookmarks-xml.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
export-pdf-bookmarks-xml.description: Exports all bookmarks from a PDF file to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

import-bookmarks-from-json.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading bookmark definitions from a JSON file, converting them to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and adding them to an existing PDF.

add-toc-bookmark-batch.title: Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs in a Folder
add-toc-bookmark-batch.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, adding a "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document and saving the result with a new filename.

validate-pdf-bookmark-count.title: Validate PDF Bookmark Count After Saving
validate-pdf-bookmark-count.description: Creates a PDF, adds bookmarks, saves it, then extracts the bookmarks to verify the expected count.

modify-pdf-bookmarks.title: Modify PDF Bookmarks Using MemoryStream
modify-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, changing bookmark titles with PdfBookmarkEditor, and returning the updated PDF as a byte array.

add-external-url-bookmarks.title: Add External URL Bookmarks to PDF
add-external-url-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates adding bookmarks that link to external web URLs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

update-bookmark-titles.title: Update PDF Bookmark Titles to Title Case
update-bookmark-titles.description: Extracts bookmarks from a PDF, converts each title to title case while preserving predefined proper nouns, and saves the updated document.

delete-bookmarks-by-pattern.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Pattern
delete-bookmarks-by-pattern.description: Demonstrates how to remove PDF bookmarks whose titles match a regular expression using PdfBookmarkEditor.

collapse-pdf-bookmarks.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks
collapse-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to set the open state of selected bookmarks to collapsed using PdfBookmarkEditor.

adjust-bookmarks-after-inserting-pages.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
adjust-bookmarks-after-inserting-pages.description: Inserts pages at the beginning of a PDF and updates bookmark destinations so they continue to point to the correct pages.

export-bookmarks-to-a-plain-text-outline.title: Export Bookmarks To A Plain Text Outline File Preserving Indentation To Reflect Hierarchy Levels

import-ofd-bookmarks.title: Import Bookmarks from OFD to PDF
import-ofd-bookmarks.description: Loads an OFD file, converts its bookmarks into PDF bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and saves the result as a PDF.

bookmark-javascript-action.title: Create Bookmark with JavaScript Action
bookmark-javascript-action.description: Adds a bookmark that runs a JavaScript alert when clicked using PdfContentEditor.

delete-bookmarks-encrypted-pdf.title: Delete All Bookmarks from Encrypted PDF
delete-bookmarks-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, remove all its bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the cleaned document.

rename-pdf-bookmarks.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using a Translation Dictionary
rename-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to rename existing PDF bookmarks based on a translation dictionary using PdfBookmarkEditor.

extract-bookmarks-verify-toc.title: Extract Bookmarks and Verify Table of Contents Consistency
extract-bookmarks-verify-toc.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks, compares their page numbers with an expected table of contents, and reports any inconsistencies.

create-image-bookmarks.title: Create Bookmarks for Each Image in PDF
create-image-bookmarks.description: Adds a bookmark for every image in a PDF, linking to the page where the image appears.

set-bookmark-zoom.title: Set Bookmark Zoom to 150% Magnification
set-bookmark-zoom.description: Updates all PDF bookmarks so that opening a bookmark displays the target page at 150% zoom.

export-bookmarks-to-excel.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Excel Workbook
export-bookmarks-to-excel.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks and writes their title, hierarchical level, and destination page to an Excel file.

import-bookmarks-csv.title: Import Bookmarks from CSV into PDF
import-bookmarks-csv.description: Reads a CSV file containing bookmark title, level, and page number, builds a hierarchical bookmark structure, and adds it to a PDF.

bookmark-named-destination.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
bookmark-named-destination.description: Demonstrates defining a named destination in a PDF and adding a bookmark that points to it for cross‑reference.

delete-duplicate-bookmarks.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF Outline
delete-duplicate-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to merge and remove duplicate bookmarks (outline entries) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

add-reviewed-bookmark.title: Add "Reviewed" Bookmark to PDF
add-reviewed-bookmark.description: Demonstrates how to add a "Reviewed" bookmark pointing to the last page of a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

set-bookmark-colors.title: Set Bookmark Colors Based on Document Sections
set-bookmark-colors.description: Demonstrates how to add bookmarks with different title colors (red for warnings, green for informational sections) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-bookmarks.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks.description: Extracts the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF and writes it to a JSON file with title, level, and page number for each node.
